examples: Nervous times for the toothy ones.
Titanoboa could've swallowed such toothy prey as though it were an appetizer.
The last fish turns out to be no cod or haddock but something eel-like, scary and toothy.
We want to save ourselves from that toothy dinosaur bearing down on our little huts.
The bronze plaque shows him with a toothy grin, too, forever the Kid.
